invariant: A multi-attendee meeting with a known account can attribute account-level topics to the shared account inferred from attendee domains.
pass_fail_definition: PASS = account-level topic is attributed to acct-b10-known and source_asof is preserved through direct and composed provenance. FAIL = topic is attached to a person, meeting, or unrelated account.

fixture_design_notes.state_sql: Seeds one account context row for get_entity_context composition.
fixture_design_notes.expected_output: MeetingBrief topics section covers a multi-attendee known-account meeting.
